name: PayPal
description: Send and receive money, pay online, and manage your balance. Widely accepted for personal transfers and business payments.

name: Revolut
description: All-in-one finance app with multi-currency accounts, stock trading, crypto, and budgeting. Free tier with interbank exchange rates.

name: Stripe
description: Developer-first payment processing platform. Accept cards, bank transfers, and 100+ payment methods globally.

name: Wise
description: International money transfers at real exchange rates. Send money abroad up to 8x cheaper than banks.

name: CoinGecko
description: Comprehensive crypto data platform tracking 10,000+ coins. Price charts, market cap rankings, DeFi data, and NFT floor prices.

name: Yahoo Finance
description: Real-time stock quotes, financial news, portfolio tracking, and market analysis. One of the most visited financial sites worldwide.

name: YNAB
description: You Need A Budget — envelope-style budgeting app that gives every dollar a job. Proven to help users save money within months.

name: TradingView
description: Professional charting platform for stocks, forex, crypto, and futures. Social network for traders with 100+ built-in indicators.
